final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] D,
    input Clk,
    input reset,
    input set,
    input load,
    output reg [3:0] Q
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge Clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) Q <= 4'b0000;
        else if (set) Q <= 4'b1111;
        else if (load) Q <= D;
    end
endmodule
